html:
Exclusive to:  

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Beard Hair Rug is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC and Don't Starve Together. It requires Beard Hair and Cut Grass to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.

Eyeplants cannot spawn on the Beard Hair Rug, making it a way of protecting oneself from Lureplants. Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts cannot be planted on a Beard Hair Rug.

Gallery

  • A patch of Beard Hair Rug.

Beard Hair Rug is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC and Don't Starve Together. It requires Beard Hair and Cut Grass to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.
Eyeplants cannot spawn on the Beard Hair Rug, making it a way of protecting oneself from Lureplants. Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts cannot be planted on a Beard Hair Rug.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thảm Tóc Râu là một Vật Phẩm Đất chế tạo được dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC và Don't Starve Together. Nó yêu cầu Tóc Râu và Cỏ Cắt để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Giống như các loại Đất khác, nó có thể được đặt trên bất kỳ nền đất trống nào hoặc dùng làm nhiên liệu.

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}}
'''Beard Hair Rug''' is a craftable [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC and ''Don't Starve Together''. It requires [[Beard Hair]] and [[Cut Grass]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]].

[[Lureplant#Eyeplant|Eyeplants]] cannot spawn on the Beard Hair Rug, making it a way of protecting oneself from [[Lureplants]]. Plants like [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Sapling]]s, [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Pine Cone]]s, and [[Birchnut]]s cannot be planted on a Beard Hair Rug.
